intro: Building software that feels clear, useful, and properly finished.
paragraphs: I build products where engineering quality and interface clarity matter at the same time.
My work usually sits between software engineering, product thinking, and design systems. I care about reducing noise, tightening the flow, and making software easier to trust.
Outside product work, I spend time on security-minded projects, teaching, and experiments that sharpen how I think about systems.

experienceIntro.title: Experience Highlights
experienceIntro.description: Leadership, teaching, product building, and creative support across startups, hackathons, and community programs.
